title: Claim Rentals
description: Claim renting, leasing, and selling for Grief Prevention claims.
body:
Based upon the work of EtienneDx, and DmitryRendov. I have updated this plugin to work with 1.21. 

I have tested this up to 1.21.10.

The plugin enables the use of signs to rent or outright sell property claimed using Grief Protection.
